title: The MHRA Inspection Process, Stage by Stage
alt: Six-stage flow of an MHRA inspection from notification to close-out

items.label: Notification & scheduling
items.desc: Routine visits announced ahead; for-cause may be unannounced

items.label: Pre-inspection prep
items.desc: Inspector requests Site Master File, logs and schedules

items.label: Opening meeting
items.desc: Scope, plan and who the inspector needs to meet

items.label: On-site assessment
items.desc: Facility tour, record review and staff interviews

items.label: Closing meeting & report
items.desc: Findings summarised, then a graded deficiency report

items.label: Response & close-out
items.desc: CAPA plan reviewed until deficiencies are accepted
